overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a scenic alien canyon with a large planet visible in the sky. The character walks through shallow water and along rocky cliffs before approaching a misty waterfall in a valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river canyon with mineral deposits

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water in a narrow canyon toward a misty opening

entered.detail: reddish-orange sediment deposits along the left riverbank
rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation rising on the left
tall rocky canyon wall on the right side
calm shallow water covering the canyon floor
massive pale planet or moon visible in the sky
mist-filled valley opening visible ahead between the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: Walking through shallow water in a narrow canyon with distinctive red mineral deposits on the left bank. The canyon walls rise on both sides while a large alien planet hangs in the sky above a misty valley ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook of misty canyon system

events.description: character exits shallow water onto rocky canyon bank
character raises hand to shield eyes from sun while observing the vista

agents.ego_description: climbing onto rocky bank and walking along cliff edge overlooking the expansive valley

entered.detail: narrow dirt and rock path along the canyon edge
flat-topped rock formations visible across the misty valley

segments.scene_description: Exiting the water onto a rocky path that ascends along the canyon edge. The view opens to reveal a vast misty valley with distant mesa formations and a large planet visible in the sky. The character briefly raises a hand to shield their eyes from the sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: high cliff trail with panoramic valley views

events.description: character turns slightly right following the curving cliff path

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow cliff path with expansive misty valley sprawling below to the left

entered.detail: jagged rock formations visible on the distant right horizon

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the narrow cliff path with the misty valley sprawling below. The camera follows as the character navigates the winding edge, with the large planet dominating the sky and distant rocky spires visible across the canyon.

events.description: approaching misty waterfall at the head of the canyon

agents.ego_description: walking toward the base of a tall waterfall with mist rising from the impact zone

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down the rocky cliff face into a pool
spray and mist rising from the waterfall base
steep rocky cliff face close on the right side

segments.scene_description: The path leads to a tall waterfall cascading down the rocky cliff face. Mist from the falls fills the air as the character approaches the water's edge, with the canyon walls enclosing the scene and obscuring the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a narrow red canyon toward the misty heights of a towering waterfall. It begins with a walk through shallow water beside red mineral deposits, moving forward as the canyon walls frame a large alien planet hanging over a distant valley. As the camera exits the water and ascends a rocky path, the view opens to reveal a vast expanse of misty mesas and rocky spires under the dominating presence of the planet. The scene then follows the character along a winding cliff edge, navigating the narrow precipice while the valley sprawls below. Finally, the path leads directly to a tall waterfall cascading down the rock face, where the enclosing canyon walls obscure the sky and fill the air with dense mist.
